overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long STX Daily ETF (STXU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Seagate Technology Holdings plc (Nasdaq: STX) stock, less fees, and expenses. STXprovides hard drives and data storage solutions for cloud computing, enterprise systems, and personal computing devices. STXU was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
